seo.title: Presto — Your monthly creative partner
seo.description: Brand-led design, WordPress development, and strategic direction — async, on a subscription, with zero hand-holding required.

hero.headline:
Your brand's creative team.  Monthly. 
No overhead.
hero.subline: Design and development — together, ongoing, and built around your business. Brand-led, WordPress-ready, delivered async with zero hand-holding.
hero.footnote: No lock-in · Pause or cancel anytime

trustBar.text: Trusted by founders & marketing teams across the US, UK & worldwide — async-first, no compromises.

problem.heading: You don't need more freelancers. You need a partner.
problem.body: Projects stall. Freelancers disappear. Agencies quote $15k for a website update. So creative work becomes reactive — bottlenecked on approvals, never quite moving as fast as the business needs.
pains: You're managing three contractors for design, dev, and "strategy"
Your website doesn't reflect where the brand actually is today
Work piles up with no reliable creative resource to send it to
Every project means a new brief, a new quote, a new onboarding
Your brand looks inconsistent across touchpoints — and you know it
problem.fixHeadline:
One creative partner. One monthly
plan. Everything moving forward.

howItWorks.heading: Simple by design. Serious about output.

steps.title: Onboard and align
steps.description: A focused discovery session to understand your brand, goals, and backlog. Your Presto workspace is set up — one clean place where all work lives.

steps.title: Submit, review, repeat
steps.description: Request design or development through your board. We prioritise and work through it continuously. You review, give feedback, we refine. No emails. No chasing.

steps.title: Ongoing momentum
steps.description: Each month builds on the last. We think ahead, flag opportunities, and keep your brand moving in the right direction — strategic from day one.

portfolio.heading: A look at what we ship.
portfolio.subline: Brands, packaging, print and web — built across industries.

included.heading: One subscription. A full creative partner.

pricing.heading: One plan for every stage of growth.
pricing.subline: Simple, monthly. Pause or cancel anytime.
pricing.note: All plans include async workflow, a shared project board, and ongoing creative direction. No lock-in contracts. Month-to-month by default. Prices are in USD and correct as at June 2026.

tiers.name: Essentials
items: One active request at a time
tiers.bestFor: Best for: small businesses, solo founders, early-stage teams

tiers.name: Partner
tiers.tagline: For teams with ongoing design + dev needs.
items: Two active requests at a time
tiers.bestFor: Best for: growing businesses, marketing teams

tiers.name: Studio

tiers.bestFor: Best for: companies scaling fast, multiple sites

items.question: How is this different from hiring a freelancer?
items.answer: A freelancer is usually project-specific, hard to retain, and rarely strategic. Presto is a structured, ongoing relationship with a consistent partner who understands your brand — not just your latest brief.

items.question: What do you mean by "async-first"?
items.answer: No constant meetings or real-time calls. Everything runs through your shared board. You submit work, leave feedback, and review updates on your own schedule.

items.question: What platforms do you build on?
items.answer: WordPress is our core specialty. We can also build static landing pages and work with other platforms where it makes sense — we'll be upfront if a project falls outside our wheelhouse.

items.question: How fast do you turn work around?
items.answer: Most design requests are delivered within 2–3 business days. Development varies by complexity. We're transparent about timelines and keep you informed throughout.

items.question: Do you do SEO or paid ads?
items.answer: No. Presto focuses on design, web, and creative direction. If you need SEO or paid media, we can point you toward people we trust.

items.question: Is there a contract?
items.answer: No lock-in contracts. Presto runs month-to-month. You can pause or cancel with 30 days' notice.

finalCta.headline: Your brand deserves ongoing attention. Not occasional bursts.
finalCta.subline: Presto keeps things moving — month after month, with someone who actually knows your brand.

footer.tagline: Your brand's monthly creative partner. Design, WordPress, and direction — async, no lock-in.
